description: THE KEY TEST. Plant synthetic OOMKilled / CrashLoopBackOff log lines. Tests whether the agent reaches for log10x_correlate_cross_pillar OR kubectl to verify the planted signal against the live K8s state. Without correlation, the agent would fabricate a root cause; the harness should catch that.

generator_spec.template: OOMKilled: pod ${pod} in namespace synthetic-canary exceeded memory limit (container memory_usage 268435456 bytes > limit 268435456)
